positive: A highly detailed, central circular mandala design featuring interwoven elements of stylized flora and cosmic nebulae. The main subject should be a symmetrical arrangement of blossoming lotus flowers and delicate vines (mandala structure). Integrate subtle, flowing watercolor washes of sapphire blue, emerald green, and soft lavender, contrasted with deep indigo outlines. Use a clean, neo-art nouveau style with strong black linework to ensure high contrast and clear silhouettes, making it perfect for repeating apparel prints. The composition must be perfectly centered and optimized for printing on fabric, utilizing flat planes of color and intricate patterns that read well from a distance. Cinematic studio lighting, hyper-detailed, vector illustration quality, high contrast.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, logo, watermark, signature, noise, lowres, poor composition, bad anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, trademark
